# io.github.seanchatmangpt.jotp.observability.HotPathValidationTest


Hot path validation ensures Proc.tell() maintains zero-overhead

The tell() method is the most frequently called operation in JOTP

Any observability code in this path would impact millions of messages per second

Comprehensive validation of all registered hot paths

This includes Proc.tell(), Proc.ask(), and mailbox operations
